footer.tagline: Live volleyball statistics. Log every action, follow the score in real time and improve match after match.
footer.rights: © {year} Voley Stats Live. All rights reserved.

hero.subtitle: Log the match from your iPad while you coach — even with no connection —, share the score and stats live and break down every set when it's over. Say goodbye to paper scoresheets.

product.title: Take control of the whole match
product.text: Log every action with the quick grid — designed so one person can coach and record at the same time — or straight on the court map, with attack and serve trajectories. You choose the detail: every touch or just the actions that end the rally. And you make your substitutions with data, not gut feeling.
product.point1: Score, rotation and server update on their own.
product.point2: Automatic detection of scoring and error runs.
product.point3: Breakdown per player and per court area.
product.point4: Filter the stats set by set.

how.title: From the court to the report in three steps
how.subtitle: No learning curve. Start logging in your very first match.
how.step1Text: Record every play from your iPad with the quick grid or on the court map, with substitutions, timeouts and graded reception. Works offline, in any gym.
how.step2Text: Share the match code and anyone can watch the score and stats in real time from the web.
how.step3Text: When it's over, you get the full match report: side-out and break, rotations, attack maps and much more. With premium, export it as a PDF to review with the team.

features.title: Everything your coaching staff needs
features.subtitle: Tools built for coaches, analysts and players.
features.f1Text: Follow the result set by set and how the match unfolds in real time from any device.
features.f2Text: Evaluate individual performance in every area and find your roster's strengths.
features.f3Text: Side-out and break, attack by phase (K1/K2) and by pass quality, reception graded on 4 levels and setter-attacker connections.
features.f4Text: Visualize point and error runs to understand the key moments of every set.
features.f5Text: With premium, export match and season reports as PDFs to share with your coaching staff and players.
features.f6Text: Share a simple code and the whole team can check the stats online, no complicated sign-ups.

download.title: Take your team to the next level
download.text: Download Voley Stats for iPad and log your next match for free, live stats included. Go premium whenever you want the season history, PDF reports and cloud backup.

faq.title: Questions?
faq.subtitle: And if you can't find your answer, write to us and we'll help.
faq.a1: It's the live web companion of Voley Stats, the iPad app for capturing and analyzing volleyball statistics. You record every action of the match from the app, and anyone can follow the score and stats live on this web, free and with no sign-up.
faq.q2: How do I check my team's stats online?
faq.a2: Go to the 'Watch live' section, enter your team code and access the live score and match stats, with a breakdown per set and per player.
faq.a3: Everything that happens on the court: every touch or just the rally-ending actions, attack and serve trajectories on the court map, reception graded on 4 levels, serve quality, K1/K2 phase tracking, substitutions and timeouts. The score, rotation and server update on their own.
faq.q4: Can I download a match report?
faq.a4: Yes. When the match ends the app builds a full report: side-out and break, where the points came from, rotations, attack by phase and by pass quality, setter-attacker connections, unforced errors and attack maps. With the premium plan you can export it as a PDF to share with the team.
faq.q5: Do I need an internet connection?
faq.a5: Not for logging: the app works fully offline, with a local database, so you can capture and check stats in any gym. You only need internet to share the live feed on this web, use the OBS overlay, the public team page or the cloud backup.
faq.a6: Downloading the app and logging your matches is free, live match stats included. The premium plan adds the team history and season stats with filters, PDF export, cloud backup and the ability to fill in stats you missed live. Watching the live feeds on the web is always free.
